interaction_phrase: Members of the Commission of Experts
occurrence_sentence: Members of the Commission of Experts for Research and Innovation (EFI)

interaction_phrase: Members of the Commission of Experts
occurrence_sentence: Members of the Commission of Experts for Research and Innovation (EFI)

interaction_phrase: the future Federal Government should place greater focus on the entire R&I system and its performance in its R&I policy strategy
occurrence_sentence: With a well-positioned, internationally leading R&I system, Germany could ignite a fresh drive for growth. The resulting economic strength would also significantly improve the chances of mastering the upcoming major transformations in digitalization and decarbonization and securing the technological and economic sovereignty of Germany and Europe. For this reason, the future Federal Government should place greater focus on the entire R&I system and its performance in its R&I policy strategy, in addition to various priority areas.

interaction_phrase: the Federal Government has not succeeded
occurrence_sentence: The Commission of Experts comes to the sobering conclusion that, despite its high R&I policy ambitions, the Federal Government has not succeeded in sparking the innovation drive necessary for the transformations.

interaction_phrase: the Federal Government did not succeed
occurrence_sentence: Many of the R&I policy projects announced in the coalition agreement were not implemented. In addition, the Federal Government did not succeed in significantly advancing the expansion of transformation infrastructures and reducing regulatory barriers to innovation to a sufficient extent.

interaction_phrase: recommends the following measures, among others
occurrence_sentence: The Commission of Experts recommends the following measures, among others:

interaction_phrase: in co-operation with its EU partners
occurrence_sentence: This will ensure that German companies remain competitive in global competition with the USA and China and that Germany is technologically sovereign and well prepared for security threats in the long term.

interaction_phrase: in co-operation with its EU partners
occurrence_sentence: Many of these new quantum technologies are still in the early stages of development. Germany is in a strong starting position, which must be safeguarded in co-operation with its EU partners.

interaction_phrase: the Federal Government should create a coherent framework for the further development of quantum technologies
occurrence_sentence: With a national quantum strategy, the Federal Government should create a coherent framework for the further development of quantum technologies.

interaction_phrase: The Commission of Experts therefore recommends the following measures, among others
occurrence_sentence: The Commission of Experts therefore recommends the following measures, among others:

interaction_phrase: the measures planned by the Federal Government
occurrence_sentence: The measures planned by the Federal Government to promote alternative forms of financing should be implemented swiftly to meet the special needs of social enterprises.
The Commission of Experts supports the testing of innovative concepts in regulatory sandboxes as envisaged in the National Water Strategy.
The recording in a comprehensive and transparent water register, as announced in the National Water Strategy, must be implemented swiftly and in digital form.
